steps.expected: All sub-tests PASS, verifying errors.As extracts *ConfigError with correct Line for type mismatches
steps.observed: All 3 sub-tests PASS. Type mismatch errors include correct line numbers (line 1 and line 2 verified).

steps.expected: PASS: overflow error for int8 field with value 200 includes Line=1 and reason containing 'overflow'
steps.observed: PASS. ConfigError has Line=1 and Reason contains 'overflow'.

steps.expected: PASS: UnmarshalFile error includes filename in File field, Source(), and Error()
steps.observed: PASS. File field is non-empty, Source() contains 'test.conf', Error() contains 'test.conf'.

steps.expected: PASS: string-based parse error has Source() in 'line:col' format (2 parts, no file)
steps.observed: PASS. Source() splits into exactly 2 parts (line:col), File is empty.

steps.expected: PASS: Error() string contains position info and mentions field name 'port'
steps.observed: PASS. Error string contains ':' position separator and mentions 'port'.

steps.expected: PASS: nested struct error for 'port = "bad"' on line 3 reports Line=3
steps.observed: PASS. ConfigError has Line=3 for nested struct error.

steps.expected: PASS: first error has non-zero line (valid position info)
steps.observed: PASS. ConfigError has non-zero Line for first reported error.

steps.action: Verify ConfigError type in unmarshal.go has Line, Column, File fields and Source()/Error() methods
steps.expected: ConfigError struct with Line int, Column int, File string, Reason string; Source() returns 'file:line:col' or 'line:col'; Error() returns 'source: reason'
steps.observed: Confirmed. ConfigError has all required fields. Source() uses fmt.Sprintf with file prefix when File is non-empty, omits file otherwise. Error() delegates to Source() + Reason.

assertions.title: Structured error type with Source() method

steps.expected: PASS: errors.As(err, &cfgErr) succeeds for type mismatch error, extracting *ConfigError with non-zero Line and non-empty Reason
steps.observed: PASS. errors.As successfully extracts *ConfigError. Line is non-zero, Reason is non-empty.

steps.expected: PASS: Source() returns 'line:col' format (2-part string) for string-based parse; File is empty
steps.observed: PASS. Source() returns 2-part 'line:col' format. File is confirmed empty for string parse.

steps.expected: PASS: Source() for file-based error contains the file path, producing 'file:line:col' format
steps.observed: PASS. Source() contains the full file path in its output.

steps.action: Verify ConfigError type exposes Line, Column, File fields for programmatic access
steps.expected: ConfigError struct has exported Line, Column, File fields matching server's configErr pattern
steps.observed: Confirmed. ConfigError has exported Line int, Column int, File string, Reason string fields. Source() method provides formatted position string.

assertions.title: Unknown field errors include the field name and position

steps.expected: PASS: strict mode error for 'bogus_field' on line 2 includes field name, 'unknown field' text, Line=2, and quoted field name format
steps.observed: PASS. Error contains 'bogus_field', 'unknown field', Line=2, and format matches 'unknown field "bogus_field"'.

steps.expected: PASS: file-based strict mode error includes filename 'server.conf' and field name 'bogus'
steps.observed: PASS. File field contains 'server.conf'. Error string contains both 'server.conf' and 'bogus'.

steps.expected: PASS: strict mode with alias tags correctly identifies 'unknown_field' as unknown (not confused by aliases)
steps.observed: PASS. Error correctly reports 'unknown_field' as unknown even when aliased fields are present.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. All 13 Go tests passed. VAL-UNMARSHAL-024: Error messages include source position (file:line:column) verified through 7 tests covering type mismatch, overflow, file-based errors, string-based errors, nested structs, and multiple errors. VAL-UNMARSHAL-025: Structured ConfigError type with Source() method confirmed via errors.As type assertion and field access, with separate verification of 2-part (string) vs 3-part (file) Source() formats. VAL-UNMARSHAL-029: Unknown field errors in strict mode include field name and position, verified through string-based, file-based, and alias-aware tests.
